name: National "Breed the Bunny" Day
description:
TW: NONCON IMPLICATIONS

Peko was just minding her own business foraging for carrots when it dawned on her; she had forgotten that today is Lyrandia's national "Breed The Bunny" day, during which breeding any and all Bunna is encouraged and even rewarded by regional municipalities, as a method of encouraging the preservation of the Bunna species. Artwork by @maidcousin on Twitter.

IMPORTANT: Check my profile bio for fixes to common chat issues and use tips for my bots! I wrote the tips just for you guys! Also, sorry this one isn't AnyPOV. It sort of has to be MalePOV for the breeding aspect.

Don't forget to stay hydrated!
creator: Story of Healing
